note: Feature release: token-economy navigation API (navigate_locate / navigate_expand), in-place maintenance primitives (reembed, reembed_batch, recompute_content), and the source_type column. Recall ranking CHANGED BY DESIGN: recall_hybrid / navigate_locate graph-proximity was reworked from an additive driver (its term reached ~10x the maximum retrieval/RRF signal, which buried a perfect vector+BM25 match below any graph-connected hub — a cold-start un-recallability defect, BUG_RECALL_GRAPH_DOMINATES) into a multiplicative tie-breaker that only re-orders already-relevant candidates. This is a correctness fix, not a regression. Competitive win-rate (vs LightRAG) is being measured separately on a controlled equal-corpus benchmark and is intentionally NOT claimed in this gate.
scoring_impact: graph_proximity recalibrated from additive driver to multiplicative tie-breaker; metadata/recency/importance aux terms unchanged
recall_ranking_impact: improved: a perfect vector+BM25 match now reaches top-3 with the graph term OFF and at the default graph_proximity_weight (0.2), even alongside a dense graph-connected hub cluster

verification.regression_suite: pg_regress extension suite 21/21 PASS on PostgreSQL 17 (version, recency_weight_guc, prov_strength_tristate, recall_lessons_pooled, verifier_role, source_run_task_ids, ttl_expires_at, state_machine, mem_edge, traverse_causal, recall_graph, traverse_temporal_smoke, temporal_boost_guc, bitemporality_smoke, as_of_ts, stress_recall, rrf_sparse, role_no_ambiguity, test_confidence, test_v071, test_v080)
verification.cold_start_guard: tests/sql/test_v080.sql T18a (graph_proximity_weight=0) + T18b (graph_proximity_weight=0.2) both assert the perfect-match lesson is in top-3 against a 5-hub + 3-neighbour densely-edged cluster — regression guard for BUG_RECALL_GRAPH_DOMINATES
verification.navigate_api: test_v080 T3-T10 cover navigate_locate token-budget cap + JSONB pushdown + navigation_path classification + navigate_expand on-demand content and graph expansion
verification.upgrade_path: extension/pgmnemo--0.7.2--0.8.0.sql; CI upgrade-path-test, clean-room-install, compat-matrix (PG14/15/16) all PASS

carry_forward_basis: LoCoMo / LongMemEval recall@k metrics carry forward from v0.7.x: the new functions are additive and the graph-proximity recalibration only affects ranking when mem_edge graph proximity would otherwise dominate, which the corpora-level recall@k headline numbers do not exercise; engine-correctness is verified by the regression suite above.
